content: CC-CAI sync pilot initialized on ai-cos-cc-adk. sync/ directory created with state.json, inbox.jsonl, project.json. Format validation in progress.
Session closed. Branch: main. Last commit: sync: seed test messages for CC↔CAI sync validation.

New plan: Add 4 sync MCP tools to ai-cos-mcp server (cos_sync_projects_list, cos_sync_state_read, cos_sync_inbox_read, cos_sync_inbox_append). This closes the CAI→CC write gap. Plan at docs/plans/2026-03-12-sync-mcp-tools-plan.md. Handoff from cc-cai-sync project.
